name: SLA Verification
question: Is the network actually delivering the service level promised in the enterprise or wholesale contract?
ifAbsent: SLA breach penalties accrue undetected. Enterprise contracts are renewed or cancelled based on perceived rather than measured performance. Revenue from SLA premium pricing is unjustified.
atL4: SLA verification becomes proactive rather than reactive. The network detects approaching SLA breach before it occurs and autonomously reallocates resources to prevent it — transforming SLA management from compensation to prevention.
